top_signals.title: Iraq Targets 770,000 bpd Through Ceyhan as Southern Output Climbs Back
top_signals.summary: Iraq has restarted production at some of its most important oil fields, including West Qurna 1, Majnoon and Fauqi, lifting national output back to roughly 1.5-1.6 million barrels per day after the collapse triggered by the Hormuz crisis, according to IraqiNews. Iraq has spent the past three months confronting a dangerous economic oil dependency caused by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, and the rebound still keeps Iraq far below the more than 4 million bpd Iraq was producing before the regional war disrupted Gulf shipping routes and forced…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: OpenAI y Anthropic alistan sus OPI que podrían redefinir el mercado de la inteligencia artificial
top_signals.summary: Dos grandes de la IA tienen la mirada puesta en los mercados bursátiles, pero algunos se preguntan si la salida a bolsa de SpaceX, prevista para junio, les va a robar el protagonismo.

top_signals.title: SpaceX wins tax exemption for $55bn AI chip plant despite local backlash
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk’s Terafab plant sparks fierce opposition and threat of legal action from residents of Texas county
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Netherlands Seizes 800 Servers, Arrests 2 for Aiding Cyberattacks
top_signals.summary: Authorities in the Netherlands have arrested the co-owners of two related Internet hosting companies for operating IT infrastructure used by Russia to carry out cyberattacks, influence operations and disinformation campaigns inside the European Union. The two men were the focus of a 2025 KrebsOnSecurity story about how their hosting companies had assumed control over the technical infrastructure of Stark Industries Solutions, an Internet service provider sanctioned last year by the EU as a frequent staging ground for cyber mischief from Russia's intelligence agencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: QXO Gets Better Terms on Buyout Debt After Strong Demand
top_signals.summary: QXO Building Products Inc. saw terms improve on a $6 billion financing package to fund its purchase of rival TopBuild Corp., which attracted more than three times the amount of demand from investors.

top_signals.title: Senior official from Germany’s AfD meets top Kremlin associates
top_signals.summary: Executives hold talks with far-right party, which leads German polls and supports restarting gas flows through Nord Stream

top_signals.title: Financial services contributed a tenth of UK economic output in 2025
top_signals.summary: The financial services sector contributed over a tenth of the UK’s economic output in the last year as the industry’s productivity outpaced average momentum.  The industry provided a £290bn boost to the UK’s real GDP – a macroeconomic measure that adjusts the value of economic output for inflation – in 2025 marking around 11 per [...]
